semantic.role: CI/CD integration template for ArchSpine architecture checks within GitLab merge requests
responsibilities: Provides a reusable .gitlab-ci.yml job to run 'spine check' on merge requests
Includes setup for LLM API key and GitLab token for MR comments
Defines artifact collection for failure output
Covers prerequisite configuration (spine init and config)
outOfScope: Documentation of ArchSpine commands beyond this template
CI integration for other platforms (GitHub Actions, etc.)
Detailed explanation of architecture rules or violations

English.purpose: This document provides a ready-to-use GitLab CI job template that integrates ArchSpine's architecture validation into the merge request workflow, automatically blocking merges if architectural violations are detected.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for development teams using GitLab who want to enforce architectural rules automatically. Readers are expected to have ArchSpine initialized in their repository and have basic knowledge of GitLab CI. The template assumes a project with LLM access and a GitLab API token for posting comments.
key_takeaways: The job runs on merge request events only.
If violations are found, it posts a formatted comment on the MR and exits with failure.
